headline: Gold prices today, Tuesday, June 16: Prices firming ahead of Fed meeting
summary: Gold August futures opened at $4,331.30 per troy ounce on Tuesday, down 0.5% from Monday's closing price. The price of gold edged higher this morning, shifting to $4,365.80 per troy ounce as of 6:49 a.m. ET.
